в—ђ Let me start by reading my terminal config file to understand my context, and
  also check the selected widgets file.

  в”‚ FOUND"
  в”” 33 lines...

в—Џ Read selected widgets (shell)

  в”‚ WIDGETS"
  в”” 16 lines...

  branch 4.3.0--prompt-widget. No connected widgets or messaging peers. What
  can I help with?
